item.title: Google Cloud
item.summary: News value Update timeline; public information only.

updates.event: 接近90%的《财富》100强企业使用Gemini Enterprise。

evidence.source_quote: 目前已有接近90%的《财富》100强企业使用Gemini Enterprise

updates.event: Gemini等谷歌自研模型API处理速率约每分钟220亿个Token，环比增长37.5%

evidence.source_quote: Gemini等谷歌自研模型API处理速率约为每分钟220亿个Token，环比增长37.5%

updates.event: 过去一年近500家谷歌云客户分别处理超过1万亿个Token

evidence.source_quote: 近500家谷歌云客户分别处理了超过1万亿个Token

updates.event: Alphabet将2026年全年资本开支指引上调至1950亿至2050亿美元

evidence.source_quote: Alphabet将2026年全年资本开支指引，由1800亿至1900亿美元上调至1950亿至2050亿美元

updates.event: 截至2026年第二季度末，谷歌云订单积压达5140亿美元，环比增加超500亿美元

evidence.source_quote: 截至季度末，谷歌云订单积压达到5140亿美元（约合人民币3.48万亿元），环比增加超过500亿美元

updates.event: 谷歌云2026年第二季度运营利润88.14亿美元，运营利润率35.6%

evidence.source_quote: 谷歌云运营利润达到88.14亿美元（约合人民币596.7亿元），约为去年同期的3.1倍，运营利润率由20.7%跃升至35.6%

updates.event: In 2026Q2, 60% of Alphabet's AI infrastructure capex was allocated to servers.

evidence.source_quote: 60% 分配至服务器

updates.event: Google Cloud added more than USD 50 billion in new backlog orders in 2026Q2.

evidence.source_quote: Google Cloud 在 2026Q2 新增了超过 500 亿美元的积压订单

updates.event: Google Cloud's total backlog reached USD 514 billion after 2026Q2 additions.

evidence.source_quote: 积压订单总额达到 5140 亿美元

updates.event: Alphabet's total debt has risen to about USD 100 billion from USD 16 billion the prior year.

evidence.source_quote: Alphabet 的总负债额已从去年的 160 亿美元升至约 1000 亿美元

updates.event: In 2026Q2, 40% of Alphabet's AI infrastructure capex was allocated to data centers and network equipment.

evidence.source_quote: 40% 分配至数据中心和网络设备

updates.event: Alphabet raised its 2026 full-year capital expenditure guidance to USD 195-205 billion.

evidence.source_quote: Alphabet 在其 2026Q2 财报电话会议中宣布将 2026 全年资本支出指引从此前的 1800~1900 亿美元进一步上调至 1950~2050 亿美元

updates.event: Alphabet's capital expenditure in 2026Q2 reached USD 44.9 billion.

evidence.source_quote: Alphabet 在 2026Q2 的资本支出达到 449 亿美元

updates.event: 谷歌云4.8亿美元的环比营收增幅为微软云和AWS树立了新标杆

evidence.source_quote: Google Cloud's $4.8 billion sequential revenue increase establishes a new benchmark for Microsoft Cloud and AWS

updates.event: 谷歌云二季度营收同比增长82%

evidence.source_quote: Google Cloud Q2 Revenue Soars 82%

updates.event: 谷歌云二季度订单积压同比增长390%

evidence.source_quote: Backlog Jumps 390%

updates.event: 谷歌云二季度营收环比增加48亿美元

evidence.source_quote: 谷歌云营收环比增加48亿美元

updates.event: Google Cloud is the leading current AI infrastructure provider among surveyed enterprises, with 48% presence in the stack.

evidence.source_quote: Google Cloud leads at 48%, and the general-purpose clouds (Google, Microsoft, AWS, Oracle) together with the major model APIs (Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic) account for essentially all current deployment.

updates.event: 摩根大通预测2027年资本开支将达3780亿美元，同比增长85%

evidence.source_quote: 摩根大通预测 2027 年资本开支将达 3780 亿美元，同比增长 85%

updates.event: TPU业务二季度首次独立确认收入，摩根大通估算单季收入超10亿美元

evidence.source_quote: TPU 业务于二季度首次独立确认收入，摩根大通估算单季收入超 10 亿美元

updates.event: Gemini API处理量由一季度约160亿Token每分钟提升至220亿Token每分钟，环比增长37.5%

evidence.source_quote: Gemini API 处理量由一季度的约 160 亿 Token 每分钟提升至 220 亿 Token 每分钟，环比增长 37.5%

updates.event: Gemini月活开发者超900万

evidence.source_quote: 月活开发者超 900 万

updates.event: 二季度末订单积压达5140亿美元，环比新增520亿美元

evidence.source_quote: 期末订单积压达 5140 亿美元，环比新增 520 亿美元

updates.event: 财富100强企业中约90%已采用Gemini Enterprise

evidence.source_quote: 财富 100 强企业中约 90%已采用 Gemini Enterprise

updates.event: Google Cloud backlog grew 390% year-over-year

evidence.source_quote: Backlog +390%

updates.event: Google Cloud backlog reached $514 billion
Google Cloud is winning new AI business and accelerating faster than Microsoft Cloud and AWS
updates.after_state: "outperforming Microsoft Cloud and AWS in new AI business"

evidence.source_quote: winning new AI business and accelerating faster than Microsoft Cloud and AWS

updates.event: Google Cloud Q2 revenue grew 82% year-over-year

evidence.source_quote: Revenue +82%

updates.event: Google Cloud Q2 revenue reached $24.8 billion
Google Cloud leads current AI infrastructure usage among surveyed enterprises.

evidence.source_quote: Google Cloud leads at 48%, and the general-purpose clouds (Google, Microsoft, AWS, Oracle) together with the major model APIs (Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic) account for essentially all current deployment.

updates.event: Voicify采用Google Cloud的Gemini模型以降低模型成本。

evidence.source_quote: Voicify cuts costs with Google Cloud's Gemini models

updates.event: Gemini 3.6 Flash scores 49% on the DeepSWE benchmark, up from 37% on Gemini 3.5

evidence.source_quote: Gemini 3.6 Flash scores 49% on the DeepSWE benchmark, a notable increase from the 37% achieved by version 3.5

updates.event: Google prices Gemini 3.6 Flash API at $7.50 per 1 million output tokens

evidence.source_quote: Google is pricing Gemini 3.6 Flash at $1.50 per one million input tokens and $7.50 per one million output tokens through its application programming interface (API)

updates.event: Google prices Gemini 3.6 Flash API at $1.50 per 1 million input tokens

evidence.source_quote: Google is pricing Gemini 3.6 Flash at $1.50 per one million input tokens and $7.50 per one million output tokens through its application programming interface (API)

updates.event: Lovelace's benchmark stack relies on a locally hosted Gemma 4 model alongside its YottaGraph context engine.

evidence.source_quote: the company's YottaGraph-context engine, running alongside a locally-hosted Gemma 4 model, achieved research-quality results virtually identical to Google's Gemini Deep Research

updates.event: Lovelace reports that the prior cloud-based inference cost was approximately $7 per report.

evidence.source_quote: reducing inference costs from approximately $7 per report to about one cent in electricity costs

updates.event: Lovelace's benchmark evaluated 18 complex investment banking research scenarios, including competitive analysis, strategic alternatives, investment memoranda, and commodities trading.

evidence.source_quote: The benchmark evaluated 18 complex investment banking research scenarios, including competitive analysis, strategic alternatives, investment memoranda, and commodities trading

updates.event: Lovelace positions its offering as enabling enterprises to use open-source models on local infrastructure for mission-critical research, reducing reliance on third-party AI providers.
updates.after_state: "enterprise local open-source AI for mission-critical research, reduced third-party dependency"

evidence.source_quote: organizations no longer need to send sensitive agent conversations to external AI providers or pay recurring cloud inference fees to produce sophisticated research and analysis

updates.event: Lovelace reports that running a locally hosted Gemma 4 model with its YottaGraph context engine produced research quality virtually identical to Google Gemini Deep Research on 18 investment banking scenarios.

evidence.source_quote: the company's YottaGraph-context engine, running alongside a locally-hosted Gemma 4 model, achieved research-quality results virtually identical to Google's Gemini Deep Research

updates.event: The extension enables users to open .ipynb files directly in the IDE, select a project, and run the notebook on a remote Workbench instance after authentication via Google Cloud.
updates.after_state: "Run .ipynb notebooks on remote Workbench instance from local IDE"

evidence.source_quote: 安装扩展程序并通过 Google Cloud 完成身份验证后，用户即可直接在 IDE 中打开 .ipynb 文件，选择一个项目，并在远程 Worbench 实例上运行笔记本。

updates.event: Google positions the extension as ideal for data scientists and developers, combining the familiar local IDE with cloud processing power to streamline experimentation, development, and scaling of ML/AI workflows.
updates.after_state: "Targeted at data scientists and developers for ML/AI workflow experimentation and scaling"

evidence.source_quote: 谷歌表示，该扩展程序非常适合数据科学家和开发人员，能够让 ML/AI 工作流的实验、开发和扩展更加顺畅。

updates.event: The integration is designed to simplify the machine learning lifecycle by eliminating context switching between local experimentation and high-performance cloud compute environments.

evidence.source_quote: 该集成专为简化机器学习生命周期而设计。通过消除上下文切换，开发人员可以无缝地从本地实验过渡到高性能云计算环境。

updates.event: The extension is delivered as a partnership/integration with Microsoft's VS Code editor.

evidence.source_quote: Google Cloud Workbench Notebooks 扩展将 VS Code 与 Google Cloud 的 Jupyter Notebooks 连接了起来

updates.event: Google released a Google Cloud Workbench Notebooks extension for VS Code that lets developers open and run Jupyter Notebooks hosted on Google Cloud directly from a local IDE.
updates.after_state: "VS Code extension for Google Cloud Workbench Notebooks released"

evidence.source_quote: 谷歌发布面向 VS Code 的 Google Cloud Workbench Notebooks 扩展，让开发者可直接在本地 IDE 中打开并运行托管在 Google Cloud 上的 Jupyter Notebook

updates.event: The Frozen v2 chip could be deployed as early as 2028.

evidence.source_quote: 这款芯片最早可能在2028年部署。

updates.event: TPU 8i is configured with 288GB high-bandwidth memory and 384MB on-chip SRAM to reduce data access cost in latency-sensitive inference.

evidence.source_quote: TPU 8i还配置了288GB高带宽内存和384MB片上SRAM，以降低延迟敏感型推理中的数据访问成本。

updates.event: Google's TPU 8i delivers up to 80% higher per-dollar performance on low-latency large-scale MoE model inference compared to Ironwood.

evidence.source_quote: TPU 8i在低延迟大规模混合专家模型推理中，每美元性能最高可提升80%

updates.event: After the Frozen v2 report, Alphabet shares rose about 3.3% in early trading on July 20 and were up 2% as of the article's writing.

evidence.source_quote: 谷歌这款新的芯片消息发布后，Alphabet股价在7月20日早盘上涨约3.3%，截至发稿前，Alphabet股价上涨2%。

updates.event: 谷歌2026年资本开支指引1800亿至1900亿美元

evidence.source_quote: 谷歌 2026 年资本开支指引 1800 亿至 1900 亿美元

updates.event: 谷歌2023年资本开支为323亿美元

evidence.source_quote: 是 2023年 323 亿美元的五倍还多

updates.event: Google DeepMind committed $40 million in AI tokens and Google Cloud credits to the U.S. Department of Energy Genesis Mission.

evidence.source_quote: Google DeepMind announced a $40 million commitment in AI tokens and Google Cloud credits to expand the Genesis Mission with the U.S. Department of Energy

updates.event: The stated objective of the Genesis Mission expansion is to be achieved within a decade.

evidence.source_quote: aiming to double the pace of scientific discovery within a decade

updates.event: The $40 million commitment is delivered as AI tokens and Google Cloud credits.

evidence.source_quote: a $40 million commitment in AI tokens and Google Cloud credits

updates.event: Federal laboratory researchers will gain access to Gemini and other AI models.

evidence.source_quote: giving federal laboratory researchers access to Gemini and other AI models

updates.event: The Genesis Mission partnership aims to double the pace of scientific discovery within a decade.

evidence.source_quote: aiming to double the pace of scientific discovery within a decade

updates.event: End users of the AI compute credits are federal laboratory researchers.

evidence.source_quote: giving federal laboratory researchers access to Gemini and other AI models

updates.event: The expanded partnership is with the U.S. Department of Energy under the Genesis Mission.

evidence.source_quote: expand the Genesis Mission with the U.S. Department of Energy

updates.event: TPU业务于二季度首次独立确认收入，摩根大通估算单季收入超10亿美元

evidence.source_quote: TPU 业务于二季度首次独立确认收入，摩根大通估算单季收入超 10 亿美元

updates.event: 二季度搜索及其他业务收入同比增长17%

evidence.source_quote: 搜索及其他业务收入同比增长 17%

updates.event: 2026年资本开支指引上修至1950亿至2050亿美元区间

evidence.source_quote: 公司将 2026 年资本开支指引由 1800 亿至 1900 亿美元区间上修至 1950 亿至 2050 亿美元区间

updates.event: 财富100强企业中约90%已采用Gemini Enterprise

updates.event: 期末订单积压达5140亿美元，环比新增520亿美元

evidence.source_quote: 二季度谷歌云实现收入 247.7 亿美元，同比增长 82%

updates.event: 二季度谷歌云收入同比增长82%

evidence.source_quote: 二季度谷歌云实现收入 247.7 亿美元，同比增长 82%

updates.event: 近90%财富100强企业已部署Gemini Enterprise。

evidence.source_quote: 近90%财富100强企业已部署Gemini Enterprise

updates.event: Alphabet将2026年全年资本支出指引从1800-1900亿美元上调至1950-2050亿美元，并预计2027财年资本开支将大幅增长。

evidence.source_quote: 公司同时将2026年全年资本支出指引从1800-1900亿美元上调至1950-2050亿美元，并预计2027财年资本开支将大幅增长

updates.event: Clearfork Intelligence founder Kyle Walker stated that Gemini 3.5 Flash has long been his daily go-to tool for agent document extraction, a use case he considers among the most valuable for LLMs.
updates.after_state: "Gemini 3.5 Flash cited as daily go-to for agent document extraction"

evidence.source_quote: Gemini 3.5 Flash 长期以来一直是我进行智能体文档提取时的日常主力工具

updates.event: Raymond James analyst Josh Beck stated in a report the week of publication that Gemini 3.5 Pro's delay has shifted external perception of Google from leader to follower in AI.
updates.after_state: "External perception shifted from leader to follower due to Gemini 3.5 Pro delay"

evidence.source_quote: Gemini 3.5 Pro 推迟发布，已经让外界对谷歌的印象从领跑者变成追赶者

updates.event: AI technology progress has driven strong growth momentum in Google Search, YouTube, and Google Cloud businesses over recent quarters.
updates.after_state: "Strong growth in Search, YouTube, Google Cloud driven by AI"

evidence.source_quote: AI 技术进步为谷歌搜索、YouTube、谷歌云等业务带来了强劲增长势头

updates.event: Google is betting on faster, more cost-effective models as a winning strategy amid rising token costs, and has released three such models.
updates.after_state: "Three faster, more cost-effective models released; strategy focused on cost efficiency amid rising token costs"

evidence.source_quote: 谷歌推出了三款速度更快、成本效益更高的模型

updates.event: Alphabet将2026年全年资本开支指引从1800亿至1900亿美元上调至1950亿至2050亿美元，中值2000亿美元

evidence.source_quote: 将全年资本开支指引从1800亿至1900亿美元上调至1950亿至2050亿美元，中值2000亿美元

updates.event: Checkout.com 将 Airflow 编排迁移至 Google Cloud 托管服务。

evidence.source_quote: By shifting orchestration to Google Cloud's managed service, the payments firm cut monthly data platform costs by about 30% and improved reliability.

updates.event: Alphabet 上调全年资本支出预期的理由是 AI 需求强劲。

evidence.source_quote: 理由是 AI 需求强劲

Alphabet raised its 2026 full-year capital expenditure guidance to USD 195-205 billion.
Alphabet's capital expenditure in 2026Q2 reached USD 44.9 billion.
Alphabet's total debt has risen to about USD 100 billion from USD 16 billion the prior year.
Google Cloud added more than USD 50 billion in new backlog orders in 2026Q2.
In 2026Q2, 40% of Alphabet's AI infrastructure capex was allocated to data centers and network equipment.

谷歌云二季度订单积压同比增长390%
Google Cloud is the leading current AI infrastructure provider among surveyed enterprises, with 48% presence in the stack.
facts.unit: % of surveyed enterprises (presence in stack, not spend)

facts.statement: 摩根大通预测2027年资本开支将达3780亿美元，同比增长85%

Gemini月活开发者超900万
二季度末订单积压达5140亿美元，环比新增520亿美元
Google Cloud Q2 revenue reached $24.8 billion
Google Cloud is winning new AI business and accelerating faster than Microsoft Cloud and AWS
facts.value: outperforming Microsoft Cloud and AWS in new AI business

facts.statement: Google Cloud backlog grew 390% year-over-year
Google Cloud Q2 revenue grew 82% year-over-year
Google Cloud leads current AI infrastructure usage among surveyed enterprises.
Voicify采用Google Cloud的Gemini模型以降低模型成本。
facts.value: Google Cloud Gemini models

facts.statement: Gemini 3.6 Flash scores 49% on the DeepSWE benchmark, up from 37% on Gemini 3.5
Google prices Gemini 3.6 Flash API at $1.50 per 1 million input tokens
Google prices Gemini 3.6 Flash API at $7.50 per 1 million output tokens
Lovelace reports that the prior cloud-based inference cost was approximately $7 per report.
Lovelace's benchmark evaluated 18 complex investment banking research scenarios, including competitive analysis, strategic alternatives, investment memoranda, and commodities trading.
Lovelace positions its offering as enabling enterprises to use open-source models on local infrastructure for mission-critical research, reducing reliance on third-party AI providers.
facts.value: enterprise local open-source AI for mission-critical research, reduced third-party dependency

facts.statement: Lovelace's benchmark stack relies on a locally hosted Gemma 4 model alongside its YottaGraph context engine.
facts.value: locally hosted Gemma 4 + YottaGraph context engine

facts.statement: Lovelace reports that running a locally hosted Gemma 4 model with its YottaGraph context engine produced research quality virtually identical to Google Gemini Deep Research on 18 investment banking scenarios.
facts.value: virtually identical research quality

facts.statement: The integration is designed to simplify the machine learning lifecycle by eliminating context switching between local experimentation and high-performance cloud compute environments.
facts.value: Designed to simplify the ML lifecycle

facts.statement: The extension is delivered as a partnership/integration with Microsoft's VS Code editor.
facts.value: Partnership/integration with VS Code

facts.statement: Google positions the extension as ideal for data scientists and developers, combining the familiar local IDE with cloud processing power to streamline experimentation, development, and scaling of ML/AI workflows.
facts.value: Targeted at data scientists and developers for ML/AI workflow experimentation and scaling

facts.statement: Google released a Google Cloud Workbench Notebooks extension for VS Code that lets developers open and run Jupyter Notebooks hosted on Google Cloud directly from a local IDE.
facts.value: VS Code extension for Google Cloud Workbench Notebooks released

facts.statement: The extension enables users to open .ipynb files directly in the IDE, select a project, and run the notebook on a remote Workbench instance after authentication via Google Cloud.
facts.value: Run .ipynb notebooks on remote Workbench instance from local IDE

facts.statement: The Frozen v2 chip could be deployed as early as 2028.
After the Frozen v2 report, Alphabet shares rose about 3.3% in early trading on July 20 and were up 2% as of the article's writing.
Google's TPU 8i delivers up to 80% higher per-dollar performance on low-latency large-scale MoE model inference compared to Ironwood.
TPU 8i is configured with 288GB high-bandwidth memory and 384MB on-chip SRAM to reduce data access cost in latency-sensitive inference.
facts.value: 288GB HBM and 384MB on-chip SRAM

facts.statement: 谷歌2023年资本开支为323亿美元
The $40 million commitment is delivered as AI tokens and Google Cloud credits.
facts.value: AI tokens and Google Cloud credits

facts.statement: The Genesis Mission partnership aims to double the pace of scientific discovery within a decade.
The expanded partnership is with the U.S. Department of Energy under the Genesis Mission.
facts.value: U.S. Department of Energy

facts.statement: The stated objective of the Genesis Mission expansion is to be achieved within a decade.
facts.value: a decade

facts.statement: End users of the AI compute credits are federal laboratory researchers.
facts.value: federal laboratory researchers

facts.statement: Federal laboratory researchers will gain access to Gemini and other AI models.
facts.value: Gemini and other AI models

facts.statement: Google DeepMind committed $40 million in AI tokens and Google Cloud credits to the U.S. Department of Energy Genesis Mission.

facts.statement: Google is betting on faster, more cost-effective models as a winning strategy amid rising token costs, and has released three such models.

facts.statement: AI technology progress has driven strong growth momentum in Google Search, YouTube, and Google Cloud businesses over recent quarters.
facts.value: Strong growth in Search, YouTube, Google Cloud driven by AI
